content:
# Session 36 (iter-036) — review

## Metadata
- **Stage:** prover (`mathlib-build`). Lane = **1.1.3 (`H_tensor`) STEP 2.5 — functorial substrate.**
- **Sorry: 2 → 2** (flat, EXPECTED — committed deliverable was the functorial substrate, NOT the iso/naturality). Live: `H_tensor` L2045 (1.1.3), `ext_finite_flat` L2074 (1.10).
- **Axioms: 23 → 23 `External.*`** (NET UNCHANGED — `External.pullbackTensorComparison` RE-TYPED, not re-added). Build exit 0 (8475 jobs, 77s). `lean_verify` axiom-clean on all 6 new/re-typed decls (only `{propext, Classical.choice, Quot.sound}` + sanctioned `External.*`; NO `sorryAx`).
- **Events:** 74 total — 19 edits, 5 goal checks, 12 diagnostics (5 clean), 0 standalone builds (REPL/diagnostic-driven), 3 lemma searches, 7 transient errors (all self-corrected).

## Target: `H_tensor` (1.1.3) — PARTIAL (substrate landed, θ-naturality deferred)

### Solved (6 decls, axiom-clean)
- **`External.pullbackTensorComparison` (L1223) — RE-TYPED, STEP 2.5-a.** Object-level iso → single-variable `NatIso` of functors `S.Modules ⥤ X.Modules`, natural in 2nd slot: `pullback f ⋙ tensorLeft (f^*A) ≅ tensorLeft A ⋙ pullback f` (1st slot `A` a parameter). Object form recovered as `(… f A).app B`. Net axiom count unchanged. `htensorComparison` updated to `(…).app N`.
  - *Why single-slot suffices:* `htensorComparison` only ever uses 1st slot **fixed** at `H(I,F)`; θ-naturality varies only `N` (2nd slot). Avoids the ~100-line product-category bifunctor build (cf. `tensorThenSheafify`).
- **`HMapFst` (L1700), `HMapFst_id` (L1710), `HMapFst_comp` (L1726) — STEP 2.5-b.** `H(-,F)` functorial covariantly in 1st slot. Construction: `φ:J⟶J'` ⟹ precomposition NatTrans `Functor.whiskerLeft (tensorBaseChangeFunctor f F) (coyoneda.map φ.op)`; conjugate by the two `H_represents…some` corepr isos; reflect through `coyoneda.preimage` (Full+Faithful via `Coyoneda.coyoneda_full/_faithful`) + `.unop`. Direction flips twice ⇒ covariant.
- **`HFunctorFst` (L1752), `htensorDomainFunctor` (L1764) — STEP 2.5-b/c.** Total functor `X.Modules ⥤ S.Modules` (`obj J := H f J F (hAdm J)`, laws from `HMapFst_{id,comp}`); `htensorDomainFunctor := tensorBaseChangeFunctor f I ⋙ HFunctorFst f F hAdm`.

### Key technique / GOTCHAs learned
- **`erw` for id-cancellation across the `homTensorFunctor` ⋙-unfolding.** `rw [Category.id_comp]`/`simp` SILENTLY FAIL to match `… ≫ 𝟙 ≫ …` because `homTensorFunctor f J F` vs its `⋙`-unfolding is not syntactic. `HMapFst_id`: `rw [hw]; erw [Category.id_comp]; rw [Iso.hom_inv_id, Functor.preimage_id]; rfl`.
- **`HMapFst_comp` recipe:** `rw [HMapFst, HMapFst, HMapFst, ← unop_comp]; congr 1; rw [← Functor.preimage_comp]; congr 1; rw [op_comp, Functor.map_comp, Functor.whiskerLeft_comp]; simp only [Category.assoc]; erw [Iso.inv_hom_id_assoc]; rfl` — middle iso cancels via `erw`, remainder definitional.
- **`Functor.whiskerLeft` is the current name** (bare `whiskerLeft` not found).

### Blocked / deferred (correctly, no sorry)
- **`htensorComparisonNatTrans` (STEP 2.5-d, θ-naturality) — NOT added.** `unfold`/`aesop_cat`/`simp [htensorComparison, HMapFst, …]` all leave the full naturality square (expected — it IS the deep content). Deferred without inserting a sorry; precise goal + corepresentation-reflection decomposition handed off (see `recommendations.md`). Est. 60–120 lines element-chasing.
- **STRUCTURAL CAVEAT (surfaced for planner):** the **total** `HFunctorFst` requires the carrier `∀ J, Admissible f J F`, forcing every `𝒪_X`-module to be LFP ⇒ **not satisfiable in general, downstream-vacuous**. The genuinely reusable substrate is the **per-morphism** `HMapFst{,_id,_comp}` (no totality hyp). STEP 3's abstract-Eilenberg–Watts plan (NatTrans of two `S.Modules` endofunctors) inherits this vacuity → STEP 3 should phrase θ-naturality **per-morphism via `HMapFst`**, or restrict `N` to an LFP subcategory.

## Target: `ext_finite_flat` (1.10) — BLOCKED, untouched
Off-lane, infra-blocked (absent internal-ℰxt / R^q f_*). Correctly not assigned.

## Analysis
- Clean, low-churn substrate round. 7 transient errors all self-corrected (whiskerLeft naming; rw-won't-match-id family → `erw`; `Iso.inv_hom_id_assoc` placement; LSP goal timeout on one large state, worked around via `lean_multi_attempt`). Exemplary judgment: re-typed the anchor single-slot rather than building the full bifunctor (correctly reasoned only 2nd-slot naturality is ever needed); deferred the θ-naturality crux WITHOUT a sorry and handed off a principled skeleton; **surfaced the `∀J,Admissible` vacuity caveat unprompted** — a genuine soundness/usability flag the planner must act on for STEP 3.
- `sync_leanok`: iter=36, sha 5e60e60, added=2, removed=0 — genuine, no laundering, no manual override warranted.
- `dag-query unmatched=3`: `HMapFst`, `HMapFst_id`, `HMapFst_comp` (coverage debt → recommendations). `pullbackTensorComparison` (re-typed; existing `lem:` block needs statement UPDATE), `HFunctorFst`, `htensorDomainFunctor` were planner-pre-authored ⇒ matched.

## Blueprint markers updated (manual)
- None this iter. (No renames vs planner hints; no Mathlib-backed leaves added — all 6 decls are anchor-built or corepr-derived; `\leanok` left to deterministic sync.)

## Doctor report
- 23 `External.*` axioms re-flagged (intentional EGA/OB/Stacks + monoidal boundary; includes the re-typed `External.pullbackTensorComparison`). NO orphan-chapter or broken-`\ref`/`\uses` findings. No new structural bugs.

## Subagent skips
- All review subagents disabled (classic single-agent loop; catalog has none enabled). No `[MANDATORY]` review subagent. Substrate round covered by `lean_verify` + `dag-query`. No dispatch warranted.
